{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Fathom (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Fathom is a world where war erupted.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Fathom is a location surrounded by a cordon.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
